mileage_history** | Column | Type | Constraints | Description | |--------|------|-------------|-------------| | id | UUID | PK, DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() | Unique identifier | | train_id | UUID | FK вҶ’ trains(id) | Train reference | | recorded_date | DATE | NOT NULL | Date of reading | | km_value | INTEGER | NOT NULL | Km at that date | | created_at | TIMESTAMP | DEFAULT NOW() | Record creation time | **Table: maintenance_schedules** | Column | Type | Constraints | Description | |--------|------|-------------|-------------| | id | UUID | PK, DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() | Unique identifier | | train_id | UUID | FK вҶ’ trains(id) | Train reference | | depot_id | UUID | FK вҶ’ depots(id) | Maintenance depot | | maintenance_type | VARCHAR(10) | NOT NULL | PM1/PM2/HM/OVH | | scheduled_date | DATE | NOT NULL | Scheduled start date | | duration_days | INTEGER | DEFAULT 1 | Duration in days | | status | VARCHAR(20) | DEFAULT 'scheduled' | scheduled/in_progress/completed/cancelled | | created_at | TIMESTAMP | DEFAULT NOW() | Record creation time | #### 20.3 Indexing Strategy ```sql -- Primary indexes (created automatically with PK) -- Already indexed: fleets.id, depots.id, trains.id, services.id, allocations.id -- Unique indexes CREATE UNIQUE INDEX depots_code_idx ON depots(code); CREATE UNIQUE INDEX trains_train_id_idx ON trains(train_id); CREATE UNIQUE INDEX services_code_idx ON services(service_code); CREATE UNIQUE INDEX allocations_service_date_idx ON allocations(service_id, allocation_date); -- Foreign key indexes (for JOIN performance) CREATE INDEX trains_fleet_idx ON trains(fleet_id); CREATE INDEX trains_depot_idx ON trains(base_depot_id); CREATE INDEX allocations_train_idx ON allocations(train_id); CREATE INDEX maintenance_train_idx ON maintenance_schedules(train_id); CREATE INDEX maintenance_depot_idx ON maintenance_schedules(depot_id); -- Query-specific indexes CREATE INDEX allocations_date_idx ON allocations(allocation_date); CREATE INDEX allocations_status_idx ON allocations(status); CREATE INDEX maintenance_date_idx ON maintenance_schedules(scheduled_date); CREATE INDEX mileage_train_date_idx ON mileage_history(train_id, recorded_date); ``` #### 20.4 Seed Data Structure **Seed Data Files** ``` scripts/seed/ в”ңв”Җв”Җ fleets.json # 3-4 fleet types в”ңв”Җв”Җ depots.json # 12-15 depots в”ңв”Җв”Җ trains.json # 100-120 trains в”ңв”Җв”Җ services.json # 50-100 services в”ңв”Җв”Җ allocations.json # Sample allocations в”ңв”Җв”Җ mileage_history.json # 6 months of history в””в”Җв”Җ maintenance.json # Scheduled maintenances ``` **Sample Seed Data** ```json // fleets.json [ { "name": "Metro Series 3400", "manufacturer": "Alstom", "pm1_interval_km": 7500, "pm2_interval_km": 30000, "hm_interval_km": 90000 }, { "name": "Metro Series 2200", "manufacturer": "CAF", "pm1_interval_km": 6000, "pm2_interval_km": 25000, "hm_interval_km": 75000 } ] // depots.json [ { "name": "Lisbon Santa ApolГіnia", "code": "LIS", "latitude": 38.7139, "longitude": -9.1094, "capacity_tracks": 8, "capacity_manhours": 120 }, { "name": "Porto CampanhГЈ", "code": "OPO", "latitude": 41.1496, "longitude": -8.5856, "capacity_tracks": 6, "capacity_manhours": 100 } ] // trains.json (example pattern) [ { "train_id": "UTE-3400-001", "fleet_name": "Metro Series 3400", "depot_code": "LIS", "current_km": 42150, "fitness_status": "fit", "latitude": 38.7139, "longitude": -9.1094 } ] ``` #### 20.5 Query Patterns **Dashboard Summary Query** ```sql SELECT COUNT(*) as total_trains, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE fitness_status = 'fit') as fit_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE fitness_status = 'unfit') as unfit_count, ROUND(STDDEV(current_km) / AVG(current_km) * 100, 1) as km_variance FROM trains; ``` **Depot Capacity Query** ```sql SELECT d.id, d.name, d.code, d.capacity_tracks, COUNT(m.id) as scheduled_count, ROUND(COUNT(m.id)::numeric / d.capacity_tracks * 100, 0) as utilization_pct FROM depots d LEFT JOIN maintenance_schedules m ON m.depot_id = d.id AND m.scheduled_date = $1 AND m.status IN ('scheduled', 'in_progress') GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY d.name; ``` **Train Ranking Query (Outliers)** ```sql WITH fleet_stats AS ( SELECT fleet_id, AVG(current_km) as fleet_avg, STDDEV(current_km) as fleet_stddev FROM trains GROUP BY fleet_id ) SELECT t.id, t.train_id, t.current_km, fs.fleet_avg, ROUND((t.current_km - fs.fleet_avg) / fs.fleet_avg * 100, 1) as delta_pct, CASE WHEN ABS(t.current_km - fs.fleet_avg) > 2 * fs.fleet_stddev THEN 'high' WHEN ABS(t.current_km - fs.fleet_avg) > fs.fleet_stddev THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END as severity FROM trains t JOIN fleet_stats fs ON t.fleet_id = fs.fleet_id ORDER BY ABS(delta_pct) DESC; ``` --- ### Chapter 21: API Specification This chapter provides the complete API reference. #### 21.1 RESTful Endpoints List **Dashboard Endpoints** | Method | Endpoint | Description | |--------|----------|-------------| | GET | /api/dashboard/summary | Fleet KPI summary | | GET | /api/dashboard/depot-capacity | Depot utilization by date | | GET | /api/dashboard/alerts | Active alerts | **Train Endpoints** | Method | Endpoint | Description | |--------|----------|-------------| | GET | /api/trains | List trains with filters | | GET | /api/trains/:id | Get train details | | GET | /api/trains/:id/history | Get mileage history | | PATCH | /api/trains/:id | Update train (position, km) | **Service & Allocation Endpoints** | Method | Endpoint | Description | |--------|----------|-------------| | GET | /api/services | List all services | | GET | /api/services/pending | Unallocated services by date | | POST | /api/allocations/recommend | Get solver recommendations | | POST | /api/allocations | Create allocation | | GET | /api/allocations | List allocations by date | | DELETE | /api/allocations/:id | Cancel allocation | **Balancing Endpoints** | Method | Endpoint | Description | |--------|----------|-------------| | GET | /api/balancing/distribution | Km distribution data | | GET | /api/balancing/outliers | Over/under running trains | **Scenario Endpoints** | Method | Endpoint | Description | |--------|----------|-------------| | POST | /api/scenarios | Create scenario | | GET | /api/scenarios/:id | Get scenario details | | POST | /api/scenarios/:id/simulate | Run simulation | | POST | /api/scenarios/:id/apply | Apply scenario | | DELETE | /api/scenarios/:id | Delete scenario | **Maintenance Endpoints** | Method | Endpoint | Description | |--------|----------|-------------| | GET | /api/maintenance | Get schedule by date range | | PATCH | /api/maintenance/:id | Reschedule maintenance | #### 21.2 Request/Response Schemas **GET /api/dashboard/summary** ```typescript // Response { "data": { "totalTrains": 112, "fitTrains": 98, "unfitTrains": 14, "kmVariance": 12.3, "varianceStatus": "yellow", "pendingAllocations": 24, "urgentAllocations": 8, "maintenanceDueThisWeek": 17 } } ``` **POST /api/allocations/recommend** ```typescript // Request { "serviceId": "uuid", "date": "2025-01-15" } // Response { "data": { "recommendations": [ { "trainId": "uuid", "trainCode": "UTE-3400-012", "score": 94, "justifications": [ "Km 12% below fleet average - prioritizing for balance", "Service ends 5km from Porto depot", "PM1 scheduled in 3 days at Porto", "45km dead running to reach Lisbon start" ], "deadRunningKm": 45 } ], "solverTimeMs": 234 } } ``` **POST /api/scenarios/:id/simulate** ```typescript // Request { "adjustments": [ { "type": "allocation_change", "trainId": "uuid", "serviceId": "uuid", "description": "Assign UTE-2200-015 to IC 501" } ] } // Response { "data": { "projectionDays": 30, "baseline": { "averageKm": 42500, "variance": 12.3, "standardDeviation": 5235, "totalDeadRunning": 245 }, "projected": { "averageKm": 43100, "variance": 8.0, "standardDeviation": 3448, "totalDeadRunning": 253 }, "impact": { "varianceChange": -4.3, "deadRunningChange": 3.2, "overRunnerCount": 3, "underRunnerCount": 2 } } } ``` #### 21.3 Error Handling **Error Response Format** ```typescript { "error": "Human-readable error message", "code": "ERROR_CODE", "details": { // Additional context (optional) } } ``` **Error Codes** | Code | HTTP Status | Description | |------|-------------|-------------| | NOT_FOUND | 404 | Resource not found | | VALIDATION_ERROR | 400 | Invalid request data | | CONFLICT | 409 | Resource conflict (e.g., double booking) | | SOLVER_ERROR | 503 | Solver unavailable or timeout | | INTERNAL_ERROR | 500 | Unexpected server error | #### 21.4 Rate Limiting & Performance **Demo Environment (No Rate Limiting)** For the demo, no rate limiting is implemented. Performance targets: | Endpoint | Target Response Time | |----------|---------------------| | Dashboard summary | < 200ms | | Train list | < 300ms | | Recommendations | < 30 seconds | | Simulation | < 10 seconds | **Caching Headers** ```http Cache-Control: private, max-age=30 ETag: "abc123" ``` #### 21.5 Versioning Strategy **Demo Approach: No Versioning** For the demo, the API is unversioned. All endpoints are at `/api/...` **Production Recommendation:** ``` /api/v1/trains /api/v1/allocations ``` Use header-based versioning for breaking changes: ```http Accept: application/vnd.mms.v2+json ``` ---

Monorepo Structure ``` mms-mfc/ в”ңв”Җв”Җ package.json # Root package (workspaces) в”ңв”Җв”Җ bun.lockb # Bun lock file в”ңв”Җв”Җ turbo.json # Turborepo config в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ apps/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ web/ # package.json в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ packages/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ types/ # Shared TypeScript types в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ src/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ train.ts в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ service.ts в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ index.ts в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ package.json в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ utils/ # Shared utilities в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ src/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ format.ts в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ validation.ts в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ package.json в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ solver/ # Python solver (standalone) в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ src/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ main.py в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ engine/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ api/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ requirements.txt в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ Dockerfile в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ docker-compose.yml # Local development в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ scripts/ в”ңв”Җв”Җ seed.ts # Database seeding в””в”Җв”Җ dev.sh # Start all services ``` #### 16.4 Service Communication **Frontend вҶ” Backend** ``` Protocol: HTTP/REST Format: JSON Authentication: None (demo mode) Base URL: http://localhost:4000/api Request Headers: Content-Type: application/json Accept: application/json Response Format: Success: { data: T, meta?: object } Error: { error: string, code: string, details?: object } ``` **Backend вҶ” Solver** ``` Protocol: HTTP/REST Format: JSON Timeout: 30 seconds Base URL: http://localhost:8000 Retry Policy: Max retries: 2 Backoff: 500ms, 1000ms Fallback: Simple scoring if solver unavailable ``` **Backend вҶ” Database** ``` Protocol: PostgreSQL wire protocol ORM: Drizzle (type-safe SQL) Connection Pool: 10 connections Timeout: 5 seconds per query ``` **Backend вҶ” Redis** ``` Protocol: Redis protocol Purpose: Caching, session storage TTL Strategy: - Dashboard data: 60 seconds - Train list: 30 seconds - Solver results: 300 seconds - Static data: 1 hour ``` #### 16.5 Key Architectural Decisions **ADR-001: Next.js App Router over Pages Router** - **Decision:** Use App Router (app/ directory) - **Context:** Next.js 14 offers App Router with React Server Components - **Rationale:** Better data fetching, layout nesting, streaming SSR - **Consequences:** Some learning curve, but better long-term architecture **ADR-002: Fastify over Express** - **Decision:** Use Fastify as API framework - **Context:** Need performant, type-safe backend - **Rationale:** 2-3x faster than Express, built-in schema validation, TypeScript support - **Consequences:** Slightly different plugin system, excellent performance **ADR-003: @zazcart/toolkit over React useState** - **Decision:** Use toolkit state machine for application state - **Context:** Complex state with animations, real-time updates - **Rationale:** Avoids stale closure issues, better debugging, predictable state - **Consequences:** Learning curve, but eliminates common React bugs **ADR-004: Blueprint.js over shadcn/ui** - **Decision:** Use Blueprint.js for UI components - **Context:** Need enterprise-grade components with dark mode - **Rationale:** Built-in dark mode, table/tree components, consistent design - **Consequences:** Larger bundle, but comprehensive component library **ADR-005: Drizzle ORM over Prisma** - **Decision:** Use Drizzle for database access - **Context:** Need type-safe, performant database layer - **Rationale:** SQL-like syntax, better performance, smaller bundle - **Consequences:** More manual work, but more control **ADR-006: Separate Python Solver** - **Decision:** Run solver as separate service, not Node.js library - **Context:** Need OR-Tools for optimization - **Rationale:** OR-Tools is Python-native, best performance - **Consequences:** Extra service to deploy, HTTP overhead acceptable --- ### Chapter matching filename export function KPICard(props: KPICardProps) { ... } // Types co-located with component interface KPICardProps { title: string; value: number | string; subtitle?: string; status?: 'green' | 'yellow' | 'red'; onClick?: () => void; } ``` **Component Structure Pattern** ```typescript // Standard component structure import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'; import { Card } from '@blueprintjs/core'; interface Props { // Props interface } export function ComponentName({ prop1, prop2 }: Props) { // 1. Hooks (store selectors, effects) const data = useSelector(selectData); // 2. Derived state const computedValue = useMemo(() => ..., [data]); // 3. Event handlers const handleClick = useCallback(() => ..., []); // 4. Render return ( {/* JSX */} ); } ``` **Component Categories** | Category | Purpose | Example | |----------|---------|---------| | Layout | Page structure | `Navbar`, `Sidebar` | | Container | Data fetching, state | `DashboardContainer` | | Presentational | Pure UI | `KPICard`, `TrainMarker` | | Interactive | User actions | `ServiceList`, `GanttBlock` | | Composite | Multiple components | `RecommendationPanel` | #### 17.3 State Management (@zazcart/toolkit) **Store Structure** ```typescript // stores/fleetStore.ts import { createMachine, useMachine, useSelector } from '@zazcart/toolkit'; interface FleetState { trains: Train[]; depots: Depot[]; selectedTrainId: string | null; loading: boolean; error: string | null; } type FleetEvent = | { type: 'FETCH_TRAINS' } | { type: 'FETCH_SUCCESS'; trains: Train[] } | { type: 'FETCH_ERROR'; error: string } | { type: 'SELECT_TRAIN'; trainId: string }; const fleetMachine = createMachine({ initial: 'idle', context: { trains: [], depots: [], selectedTrainId: null, loading: false, error: null, }, states: { idle: { on: { FETCH_TRAINS: { target: 'loading', actions: ['setLoading'], }, }, }, loading: { on: { FETCH_SUCCESS: { target: 'idle', actions: ['setTrains', 'clearLoading'], }, FETCH_ERROR: { target: 'error', actions: ['setError'], }, }, }, error: { on: { FETCH_TRAINS: { target: 'loading', actions: ['setLoading', 'clearError'], }, }, }, }, }); // Selectors export const selectTrains = (state: FleetState) => state.trains; export const selectSelectedTrain = (state: FleetState) => state.trains.find(t => t.id === state.selectedTrainId); // Hook export function useFleetStore() { return useMachine(fleetMachine); } ``` **Usage in Components** ```typescript // components/fleet/TrainList.tsx import { useFleetStore, selectTrains } from '@/stores/fleetStore'; export function TrainList() { const { state, send } = useFleetStore(); const trains = useSelector(selectTrains); useEffect(() => { send({ type: 'FETCH_TRAINS' }); }, [send]); if (state.loading) return ; if (state.error) return ; return (
{trains.map(train => ( send({ type: 'SELECT_TRAIN', trainId: train.id })} /> ))}
); } ``` #### 17.4 API Client Pattern **Centralized API Client** ```typescript // lib/api.ts const API_BASE = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || 'http://localhost:4000/api'; interface ApiResponse { data: T; meta?: { total?: number; page?: number; }; } interface ApiError { error: string; code: string; details?: Record; } async function request( endpoint: string, options: RequestInit = {} ): Promise { const url = `${API_BASE}${endpoint}`; const response = await fetch(url, { ...options, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...options.headers, }, }); if (!response.ok) { const error: ApiError = await response.json(); throw new Error(error.error || 'API Error'); } const result: ApiResponse = await response.json(); return result.data; } // Typed API methods export const api = { // Dashboard getDashboardSummary: () => request('/dashboard/summary'), getDepotCapacity: (date?: string) => request(`/dashboard/depot-capacity${date ? `?date=${date}` : ''}`), // Trains getTrains: (params?: TrainFilters) => request(`/trains${toQueryString(params)}`), getTrain: (id: string) => request(`/trains/${id}`), getTrainHistory: (id: string, months?: number) => request(`/trains/${id}/history?months=${months || 6}`), // Services & Allocation getPendingServices: (date: string) => request(`/services/pending?date=${date}`), getRecommendations: (serviceId: string, date: string) => request('/allocations/recommend', { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify({ serviceId, date }), }), createAllocation: (data: AllocationRequest) => request('/allocations', { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify(data), }), // Balancing getDistribution: (fleetId?: string) => request(`/balancing/distribution${fleetId ? `?fleet=${fleetId}` : ''}`), getOutliers: () => request('/balancing/outliers'), // Simulation createScenario: (name: string) => request('/scenarios', { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify({ name }), }), runSimulation: (scenarioId: string, adjustments: Adjustment[]) => request(`/scenarios/${scenarioId}/simulate`, { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify({ adjustments }), }), // Maintenance getMaintenanceSchedule: (startDate: string, endDate: string) => request(`/maintenance?start=${startDate}&end=${endDate}`), rescheduleMaintenace: (id: string, newDate: string) => request(`/maintenance/${id}`, { method: 'PATCH', body: JSON.stringify({ scheduledDate: newDate }), }), }; ``` #### 17.5 Blueprint.js Integration **Theme Configuration** ```typescript // components/layout/ThemeProvider.tsx import { Classes, Colors } from '@blueprintjs/core'; import '@blueprintjs/core/lib/css/blueprint.css'; import '@blueprintjs/icons/lib/css/blueprint-icons.css'; export function ThemeProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) { return (
{children}
); } ``` **Component Usage Pattern** ```typescript // Using Blueprint.js components import { Card, Elevation, Button, Intent, Tag, Spinner, NonIdealState, Tooltip, } from '@blueprintjs/core'; export function KPICard({ title, value, status, onClick }: KPICardProps) { return (
{title} {status}
{value}
 ); } function statusToIntent(status?: string): Intent { switch (status) { case 'green': return Intent.SUCCESS; case 'yellow': return Intent.WARNING; case 'red': return Intent.DANGER; default: return Intent.NONE; } } ``` **Blueprint.js Components Used** | Component | Use Case | |-----------|----------| | `Card` | KPI cards, panels, popups | | `Table` | Train list, rankings | | `Button` | Actions, navigation | | `Tag` | Status badges | | `Spinner` | Loading states | | `Tooltip` | Help text, details | | `Dialog` | Confirmation modals | | `Toast` | Notifications | | `NonIdealState` | Empty/error states | | `Menu` | Dropdown menus | | `Tabs` | Section navigation | #### 17.6 Styling Strategy **Tailwind + Blueprint.js Integration** ```css /* globals.css */ @tailwind base; @tailwind components; @tailwind utilities; /* Blueprint.js dark mode overrides */ .bp5-dark { --bg-primary: #1c2127; --bg-secondary: #252a31; --text-primary: #f5f8fa; --text-secondary: #a7b6c2; } /* Custom utility classes for MMS */ @layer components { .kpi-card { @apply p-4 bg-slate-800 rounded-lg border border-slate-700; } .traffic-light { @apply w-3 h-3 rounded-full; } .traffic-light-green { @apply bg-green-500; } .traffic-light-yellow { @apply bg-yellow-500; } .traffic-light-red { @apply bg-red-500; } } ``` **CSS Variables for Theme** ```css :root { /* MMS Color System */ --mms-green: #2d8a4e; /* Dark Mode Surfaces */ --surface-0: #1c2127; --surface-1: #252a31; --surface-2: #2f343c; --surface-3: #383e47; } ``` --- ### Chapter 18: Backend Architecture This chapter details the Fastify API implementation patterns. #### 18.1 Fastify Server Structure ```typescript // apps/api/src/index.ts import Fastify from 'fastify'; import cors from '@fastify/cors'; import { dashboardRoutes } from './routes/dashboard'; import { trainRoutes } from './routes/trains'; import { allocationRoutes } from './routes/allocations'; import { simulationRoutes } from './routes/simulation'; import { maintenanceRoutes } from './routes/maintenance'; import { db } from './db/client'; const server = Fastify({ logger: true, }); // Plugins await server.register(cors, { origin: ['http://localhost:3000'], }); // Database connection server.decorate('db', db); // Routes server.register(dashboardRoutes, { prefix: '/api/dashboard' }); server.register(trainRoutes, { prefix: '/api/trains' }); server.register(allocationRoutes, { prefix: '/api/allocations' }); server.register(simulationRoutes, { prefix: '/api/simulation' }); server.register(maintenanceRoutes, { prefix: '/api/maintenance' }); // Health check server.get('/health', async () => ({ status: 'ok' })); // Start server const start = async () => { try { await server.listen({ port: 4000, host: '0.0.0.0' }); console.log('Server running on http://localhost:4000'); } catch (err) { server.log.error(err); process.exit(1); } }; start(); ``` #### 18.2 Route Organization **Route File Pattern** ```typescript // apps/api/src/routes/trains.ts import { FastifyPluginAsync } from 'fastify'; import { TrainService } from '../services/trainService'; import { TrainFilters, TrainResponse } from '../types'; export const trainRoutes: FastifyPluginAsync = async (fastify) => { const trainService = new TrainService(fastify.db); // GET /api/trains fastify.get<{ Querystring: TrainFilters; Reply: { data: TrainResponse[] }; }>('/', { schema: { querystring: { type: 'object', properties: { fleet: { type: 'string' }, depot: { type: 'string' }, status: { type: 'string', enum: ['fit', 'unfit'] }, }, }, }, }, async (request, reply) => { const trains = await trainService.getTrains(request.query); return { data: trains }; }); // GET /api/trains/:id fastify.get<{ Params: { id: string }; Reply: { data: TrainResponse }; }>('/:id', async (request, reply) => { const train = await trainService.getTrainById(request.params.id); if (!train) { return reply.status(404).send({ error: 'Train not found', code: 'NOT_FOUND' }); } return { data: train }; }); // GET /api/trains/:id/history fastify.get<{ Params: { id: string }; Querystring: { months?: number }; Reply: { data: MileagePoint[] }; }>('/:id/history', async (request, reply) => { const months = request.query.months || 6; const history = await trainService.getTrainHistory(request.params.id, months); return { data: history }; }); }; ``` **Route Summary** | Method | Path | Handler | Description | |--------|------|---------|-------------| | GET | /api/dashboard/summary | getDashboardSummary | KPI metrics | | GET | /api/dashboard/depot-capacity | getDepotCapacity | Depot utilization | | GET | /api/trains | getTrains | List trains with filters | | GET | /api/trains/:id | getTrainById | Single train details | | GET | /api/trains/:id/history | getTrainHistory | Mileage history | | GET | /api/services/pending | getPendingServices | Unallocated services | | POST | /api/allocations/recommend | getRecommendations | Solver recommendations | | POST | /api/allocations | createAllocation | Create allocation | | GET | /api/balancing/distribution | getDistribution | Km distribution | | GET | /api/balancing/outliers | getOutliers | Over/under runners | | POST | /api/scenarios | createScenario | New scenario | | POST | /api/scenarios/:id/simulate | runSimulation | Execute simulation | | GET | /api/maintenance | getSchedule | Maintenance timeline | | PATCH | /api/maintenance/:id | reschedule | Move maintenance | #### 18.3 Service Layer Pattern **Service Class Structure** ```typescript // apps/api/src/services/trainService.ts import { eq, and, gte, lte, sql } from 'drizzle-orm'; import { db } from '../db/client'; import { trains, fleets, depots, mileageHistory } from '../db/schema'; export class TrainService { constructor(private db: typeof db) {} async getTrains(filters: TrainFilters): Promise { let query = this.db .select({ id: trains.id, trainId: trains.trainId, currentKm: trains.currentKm, fitnessStatus: trains.fitnessStatus, fleetName: fleets.name, depotName: depots.name, latitude: trains.latitude, longitude: trains.longitude, }) .from(trains) .leftJoin(fleets, eq(trains.fleetId, fleets.id)) .leftJoin(depots, eq(trains.baseDepotId, depots.id)); if (filters.fleet) { query = query.where(eq(trains.fleetId, filters.fleet)); } if (filters.depot) { query = query.where(eq(trains.baseDepotId, filters.depot)); } if (filters.status) { query = query.where(eq(trains.fitnessStatus, filters.status)); } return query; } async getTrainById(id: string): Promise { const [train] = await this.db .select() .from(trains) .leftJoin(fleets, eq(trains.fleetId, fleets.id)) .leftJoin(depots, eq(trains.baseDepotId, depots.id)) .where(eq(trains.id, id)); if (!train) return null; // Calculate delta from fleet average const avgResult = await this.db .select({ avg: sql`avg(${trains.currentKm})` }) .from(trains) .where(eq(trains.fleetId, train.trains.fleetId)); const fleetAverage = avgResult[0]?.avg || 0; const deltaPercent = ((train.trains.currentKm - fleetAverage) / fleetAverage) * 100; return { ...train.trains, fleet: train.fleets, depot: train.depots, deltaPercent: Math.round(deltaPercent * 10) / 10, }; } async getTrainHistory(trainId: string, months: number): Promise { const startDate = new Date(); startDate.setMonth(startDate.getMonth() - months); return this.db .select({ date: mileageHistory.recordedDate, km: mileageHistory.kmValue, }) .from(mileageHistory) .where( and( eq(mileageHistory.trainId, trainId), gte(mileageHistory.recordedDate, startDate) ) ) .orderBy(mileageHistory.recordedDate); } } ``` #### 18.4 Database Access (Drizzle ORM) **Schema Definition** ```typescript // apps/api/src/db/schema.ts import { pgTable, uuid, varchar, integer, decimal, timestamp, date, time, jsonb, index, uniqueIndex, } from 'drizzle-orm/pg-core'; export const fleets = pgTable('fleets', { id: uuid('id').primaryKey().defaultRandom(), name: varchar('name', { length: 100 }).notNull(), manufacturer: varchar('manufacturer', { length: 50 }), pm1IntervalKm: integer('pm1_interval_km').notNull(), pm2IntervalKm: integer('pm2_interval_km').notNull(), hmIntervalKm: integer('hm_interval_km').notNull(), createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow(), }); export const depots = pgTable('depots', { id: uuid('id').primaryKey().defaultRandom(), name: varchar('name', { length: 100 }).notNull(), code: varchar('code', { length: 10 }).notNull(), latitude: decimal('latitude', { precision: 10, scale: 6 }), longitude: decimal('longitude', { precision: 10, scale: 6 }), capacityTracks: integer('capacity_tracks').default(5), capacityManhours: integer('capacity_manhours').default(80), createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow(), }, (table) => [ uniqueIndex('depots_code_idx').on(table.code), ]); export const trains = pgTable('trains', { id: uuid('id').primaryKey().defaultRandom(), trainId: varchar('train_id', { length: 20 }).notNull(), fleetId: uuid('fleet_id').references(() => fleets.id), baseDepotId: uuid('base_depot_id').references(() => depots.id), currentKm: integer('current_km').default(0), targetKm: integer('target_km').default(0), fitnessStatus: varchar('fitness_status', { length: 10 }).default('fit'), lastMaintenanceDate: date('last_maintenance_date'), nextMaintenanceKm: integer('next_maintenance_km'), latitude: decimal('latitude', { precision: 10, scale: 6 }), longitude: decimal('longitude', { precision: 10, scale: 6 }), createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow(), updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at').defaultNow(), }, (table) => [ uniqueIndex('trains_train_id_idx').on(table.trainId), index('trains_fleet_idx').on(table.fleetId), index('trains_depot_idx').on(table.baseDepotId), ]); // ... additional tables (services, allocations, mileageHistory, maintenanceSchedules) ``` **Database Client** ```typescript // apps/api/src/db/client.ts import { drizzle } from 'drizzle-orm/node-postgres'; import { Pool } from 'pg'; import * as schema from './schema'; const pool = new Pool({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL, max: 10, }); export const db = drizzle(pool, { schema }); ``` #### 18.5 Caching Strategy (Redis) **Cache Configuration** ```typescript // apps/api/src/cache/redis.ts import Redis from 'ioredis'; const redis = new Redis(process.env.REDIS_URL || 'redis://localhost:6379'); export const cache = { async get(key: string): Promise { const data = await redis.get(key); return data ? JSON.parse(data) : null; }, async set(key: string, value: T, ttlSeconds: number): Promise { await redis.setex(key, ttlSeconds, JSON.stringify(value)); }, async del(key: string): Promise { await redis.del(key); }, async invalidatePattern(pattern: string): Promise { const keys = await redis.keys(pattern); if (keys.length > 0) { await redis.del(...keys); } }, }; // Cache key patterns export const CACHE_KEYS = { DASHBOARD_SUMMARY: 'dashboard:summary', DEPOT_CAPACITY: (date: string) => `depot:capacity:${date}`, TRAINS_LIST: (hash: string) => `trains:list:${hash}`, TRAIN_DETAIL: (id: string) => `train:${id}`, SOLVER_RESULT: (hash: string) => `solver:${hash}`, }; // TTL values in seconds export const CACHE_TTL = { DASHBOARD: 60, // 1 minute TRAINS: 30, // 30 seconds DEPOT: 300, // 5 minutes SOLVER: 300, // 5 minutes STATIC: 3600, // 1 hour }; ``` **Cache Usage in Service** ```typescript // Using cache in service layer async getDashboardSummary(): Promise { // Try cache first const cached = await cache.get(CACHE_KEYS.DASHBOARD_SUMMARY); if (cached) return cached; // Fetch from database const summary = await this.computeDashboardSummary(); // Store in cache await cache.set(CACHE_KEYS.DASHBOARD_SUMMARY, summary, CACHE_TTL.DASHBOARD); return summary; } ``` #### 18.6 Error Handling **Error Types** ```typescript // apps/api/src/errors/index.ts export class AppError extends Error { constructor( public statusCode: number, public code: string, message: string, public details?: Record ) { super(message); this.name = 'AppError'; } } export class NotFoundError extends AppError { constructor(resource: string, id: string) { super(404, 'NOT_FOUND', `${resource} with id ${id} not found`); } } export class ValidationError extends AppError { constructor(message: string, details?: Record) { super(400, 'VALIDATION_ERROR', message, details); } } export class ConflictError extends AppError { constructor(message: string) { super(409, 'CONFLICT', message); } } export class SolverError extends AppError { constructor(message: string) { super(503, 'SOLVER_ERROR', message); } } ``` **Global Error Handler** ```typescript // Error handler plugin fastify.setErrorHandler((error, request, reply) => { if (error instanceof AppError) { return reply.status(error.statusCode).send({ error: error.message, code: error.code, details: error.details, }); } // Unexpected error fastify.log.error(error); return reply.status(500).send({ error: 'Internal Server Error', code: 'INTERNAL_ERROR', }); }); ``` --- ### Chapter 19: Python Solver Architecture This chapter details the OR-Tools optimization engine. #### 19.1 OR-Tools CP-SAT Model **Solver Structure** ```python # solver/src/engine/allocator.py from ortools.sat.python import cp_model from dataclasses import dataclass from typing import List, Tuple @dataclass class Train: id: str train_code: str current_km: int fleet_average: int depot_id: str latitude: float longitude: float fitness_status: str @dataclass class Service: id: str service_code: str distance_km: int origin: str destination: str origin_lat: float origin_lng: float dest_lat: float dest_lng: float class AllocationSolver: def __init__(self, trains: List[Train], service: Service, config: dict): self.trains = trains self.service = service self.config = config self.model = cp_model.CpModel() def solve(self) -> List[dict]: # Filter fit trains only candidates = [t for t in self.trains if t.fitness_status == 'fit'] if not candidates: return [] # Score each candidate scored = [] for train in candidates: score = self._calculate_score(train) justifications = self._generate_justifications(train) scored.append({ 'train_id': train.id, 'train_code': train.train_code, 'score': score, 'justifications': justifications, 'dead_running_km': self._calculate_dead_running(train), }) # Sort by score descending scored.sort(key=lambda x: x['score'], reverse=True) # Return top 5 return scored[:5] ``` #### 19.2 Scoring Algorithm **Score Breakdown** | Factor | Weight | Scoring Logic | |--------|--------|--------------| | Km Balance | 40% | Lower delta from average = higher score | | Dead Running | 15% | Shorter empty km = higher score | | Depot Proximity | 25% | Closer to maintenance depot = higher score | | Maintenance Alignment | 20% | Aligned with scheduled maintenance = higher score | **Score Calculation** ```python def _calculate_score(self, train: Train) -> int: score = 100 # Start with perfect score # Factor 1: Km Balance (40% weight) delta_pct = abs(train.current_km - train.fleet_average) / train.fleet_average balance_penalty = min(delta_pct * 100, 40) # Bonus for under-running trains if train.current_km < train.fleet_average: balance_penalty = balance_penalty * 0.5 score -= balance_penalty # Factor 2: Dead Running (15% weight) dead_km = self._calculate_dead_running(train) dead_penalty = min((dead_km / 100) * 15, 15) score -= dead_penalty # Factor 3: Depot Proximity (25% weight) dest_to_depot = self._distance_to_nearest_depot(train) proximity_penalty = min((dest_to_depot / 50) * 25, 25) score -= proximity_penalty return max(0, min(100, int(score))) ``` #### 19.3 Justification Generation **Justification Templates** ```python JUSTIFICATION_TEMPLATES = { 'km_balance_under': "Km {delta:.0f}% below fleet average - prioritizing for balance", 'km_balance_over': "Km {delta:.0f}% above average - acceptable given other factors", 'dead_running_low': "Only {km}km dead running to service start", 'dead_running_high': "вҡ пёҸ {km}km dead running - consider alternatives", 'depot_close': "Service ends {km}km from {depot} maintenance depot", 'maintenance_aligned': "PM{type} scheduled in {days} days - natural alignment", } ``` #### 19.4 API Interface (FastAPI) ```python # solver/src/main.py from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException from pydantic import BaseModel from typing import List, Optional import time app = FastAPI(title="MMS Solver", version="1.0.0") class RecommendRequest(BaseModel): service: ServiceInput candidates: List[TrainInput] constraints: Optional[dict] = {} class RecommendResponse(BaseModel): recommendations: List[Recommendation] solver_time_ms: int @app.post("/recommend", response_model=RecommendResponse) async def recommend(request: RecommendRequest): start_time = time.time() solver = AllocationSolver(...) results = solver.solve() solver_time = int((time.time() - start_time) * 1000) return RecommendResponse(recommendations=results, solver_time_ms=solver_time) @app.get("/health") async def health(): return {"status": "ok", "solver": "ready"} ``` #### 19.5 Fallback Mechanisms **Simple Scoring Fallback** ```python def simple_score(trains: List[Train], service: Service) -> List[dict]: """Fallback when CP-SAT times out.""" scored = [] for train in trains: if train.fitness_status != 'fit': continue delta_pct = abs(train.current_km - train.fleet_average) / train.fleet_average score = max(0, 100 - int(delta_pct * 100)) if train.current_km < train.fleet_average: score = min(100, score + 10) scored.append({ 'train_id': train.id, 'train_code': train.train_code, 'score': score, 'justifications': ["Scored using simple heuristic (solver timeout)"], 'dead_running_km': 0, }) return sorted(scored, key=lambda x: x['score'], reverse=True)[:5] ``` Historical km readings | #### 20.3 Indexing Strategy ```sql -- Unique indexes CREATE UNIQUE INDEX depots_code_idx ON depots(code); CREATE UNIQUE INDEX trains_train_id_idx ON trains(train_id); CREATE UNIQUE INDEX services_code_idx ON services(service_code); CREATE UNIQUE INDEX allocations_service_date_idx ON allocations(service_id, allocation_date); -- Foreign key indexes CREATE INDEX trains_fleet_idx ON trains(fleet_id); CREATE INDEX trains_depot_idx ON trains(base_depot_id); CREATE INDEX allocations_date_idx ON allocations(allocation_date); CREATE INDEX maintenance_date_idx ON maintenance_schedules(scheduled_date); CREATE INDEX mileage_train_date_idx ON mileage_history(train_id, recorded_date); ``` #### 20.4 Seed Data Structure **Data Volumes** | Table | Record Count | Notes | |-------|--------------|-------| | fleets | 3-4 | Different train series | | depots | 12-15 | Portuguese railway network | | trains | 100-120 | Realistic fleet size | | services | 50-100 | Daily service patterns | | allocations | Variable | Sample allocations | | mileage_history | ~22,000 | 6 months Г— 120 trains | | maintenance_schedules | 200-300 | 3-month window | #### 20.5 Query Patterns **Dashboard Summary** ```sql SELECT COUNT(*) as total_trains, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE fitness_status = 'fit') as fit_count, ROUND(STDDEV(current_km) / AVG(current_km) * 100, 1) as km_variance FROM trains; ``` **Train Ranking (Outliers)** ```sql WITH fleet_stats AS ( SELECT fleet_id, AVG(current_km) as avg, STDDEV(current_km) as stddev FROM trains GROUP BY fleet_id ) SELECT t.train_id, t.current_km, ROUND((t.current_km - fs.avg) / fs.avg * 100, 1) as delta_pct FROM trains t JOIN fleet_stats fs ON t.fleet_id = fs.fleet_id ORDER BY ABS(delta_pct) DESC; ``` --- ### Chapter 21: API | Fleet KPI summary | | GET | /api/dashboard/depot-capacity | Depot utilization | | GET | /api/trains | List trains | | GET | /api/trains/:id | Train details | | GET | /api/trains/:id/history | Mileage history | | GET | /api/services/pending | Unallocated services | | POST | /api/allocations/recommend | Get recommendations | | POST | /api/allocations | Create allocation | | GET | /api/balancing/distribution | Km distribution | | GET | /api/balancing/outliers | Over/under runners | | POST | /api/scenarios | Create scenario | | POST | /api/scenarios/:id/simulate | Run simulation | | GET | /api/maintenance | Get schedule | | PATCH | /api/maintenance/:id | Reschedule | #### 21.2 Request/Response Schemas **GET /api/dashboard/summary Response** ```json { "data": { "totalTrains": 112, "fitTrains": 98, "unfitTrains": 14, "kmVariance": 12.3, "varianceStatus": "yellow", "pendingAllocations": 24, "maintenanceDueThisWeek": 17 } } ``` **POST /api/allocations/recommend Response** ```json { "data": { "recommendations": [ { "trainId": "uuid", "trainCode": "UTE-3400-012", "score": 94, "justifications": [ "Km 12% below fleet average", "Service ends 5km from Porto depot", "PM1 scheduled in 3 days" ], "deadRunningKm": 45 } ], "solverTimeMs": 234 } } ``` #### 21.3 Error Handling **Error Response Format** ```json { "error": "Train not found", "code": "NOT_FOUND", "details": {} } ``` **Error Codes** | Code | HTTP Status | Description | |------|-------------|-------------| | NOT_FOUND | 404 | Resource not found | | VALIDATION_ERROR | 400 | Invalid request | | CONFLICT | 409 | Resource conflict | | SOLVER_ERROR | 503 | Solver unavailable | | INTERNAL_ERROR | 500 | Server error | #### 21.4 Rate Limiting & Performance **Target Response Times** | Endpoint | Target | |----------|--------| | Dashboard | < 200ms | | Train list | < 300ms | | Recommendations | < 30s | | Simulation | < 10s | #### 21.5 Versioning Strategy For demo: No versioning (all endpoints at `/api/...`) Production recommendation: `/api/v1/...` prefix with header-based versioning for breaking changes. ---

  3900вҶ’
  3901вҶ’#### 16.4 Service Communication
  3902вҶ’
  3903вҶ’**Frontend вҶ” Backend**
  3904вҶ’
  3905вҶ’```
  3906вҶ’Protocol: HTTP/REST
  3907вҶ’Format: JSON
  3908вҶ’Authentication: None (demo mode)
  3909вҶ’Base URL: http://localhost:4000/api
  3910вҶ’
  3911вҶ’Request Headers:
  3912вҶ’  Content-Type: application/json
  3913вҶ’  Accept: application/json
  3914вҶ’
  3915вҶ’Response Format:
  3916вҶ’  Success: { data: T, meta?: object }
  3917вҶ’  Error: { error: string, code: string, details?: object }
  3918вҶ’```
  3919вҶ’
  3920вҶ’**Backend вҶ” Solver**
  3921вҶ’
  3922вҶ’```
  3923вҶ’Protocol: HTTP/REST
  3924вҶ’Format: JSON
  3925вҶ’Timeout: 30 seconds
  3926вҶ’Base URL: http://localhost:8000
  3927вҶ’
  3928вҶ’Retry Policy:
  3929вҶ’  Max retries: 2
  3930вҶ’  Backoff: 500ms, 1000ms
  3931вҶ’  Fallback: Simple scoring if solver unavailable
  3932вҶ’```
  3933вҶ’
  3934вҶ’**Backend вҶ” Database**
  3935вҶ’
  3936вҶ’```
  3937вҶ’Protocol: PostgreSQL wire protocol
  3938вҶ’ORM: Drizzle (type-safe SQL)
  3939вҶ’Connection Pool: 10 connections
  3940вҶ’Timeout: 5 seconds per query
  3941вҶ’```
  3942вҶ’
  3943вҶ’**Backend вҶ” Redis**
  3944вҶ’
  3945вҶ’```
  3946вҶ’Protocol: Redis protocol
  3947вҶ’Purpose: Caching, session storage
  3948вҶ’TTL Strategy:
  3949вҶ’  - Dashboard data: 60 seconds
  3950вҶ’  - Train list: 30 seconds
  3951вҶ’  - Solver results: 300 seconds
  3952вҶ’  - Static data: 1 hour
  3953вҶ’```
  3954вҶ’
  3955вҶ’#### 16.5 Key Architectural Decisions
  3956вҶ’
  3957вҶ’**ADR-001: Next.js App Router over Pages Router**
  3958вҶ’
  3959вҶ’- **Decision:** Use App Router (app/ directory)
  3960вҶ’- **Context:** Next.js 14 offers App Router with React Server Components
  3961вҶ’- **Rationale:** Better data fetching, layout nesting, streaming SSR
  3962вҶ’- **Consequences:** Some learning curve, but better long-term architecture
  3963вҶ’
  3964вҶ’**ADR-002: Fastify over Express**
  3965вҶ’
  3966вҶ’- **Decision:** Use Fastify as API framework
  3967вҶ’- **Context:** Need performant, type-safe backend
  3968вҶ’- **Rationale:** 2-3x faster than Express, built-in schema validation, TypeScript support
  3969вҶ’- **Consequences:** Slightly different plugin system, excellent performance
  3970вҶ’
  3971вҶ’**ADR-003: @zazcart/toolkit over React useState**
  3972вҶ’
  3973вҶ’- **Decision:** Use toolkit state machine for application state
  3974вҶ’- **Context:** Complex state with animations, real-time updates
  3975вҶ’- **Rationale:** Avoids stale closure issues, better debugging, predictable state
  3976вҶ’- **Consequences:** Learning curve, but eliminates common React bugs
  3977вҶ’
  3978вҶ’**ADR-004: Blueprint.js over shadcn/ui**
  3979вҶ’
  3980вҶ’- **Decision:** Use Blueprint.js for UI components
  3981вҶ’- **Context:** Need enterprise-grade components with dark mode
  3982вҶ’- **Rationale:** Built-in dark mode, table/tree components, consistent design
  3983вҶ’- **Consequences:** Larger bundle, but comprehensive component library
  3984вҶ’
  3985вҶ’**ADR-005: Drizzle ORM over Prisma**
  3986вҶ’
  3987вҶ’- **Decision:** Use Drizzle for database access
  3988вҶ’- **Context:** Need type-safe, performant database layer
  3989вҶ’- **Rationale:** SQL-like syntax, better performance, smaller bundle
  3990вҶ’- **Consequences:** More manual work, but more control
  3991вҶ’
  3992вҶ’**ADR-006: Separate Python Solver**
  3993вҶ’
  3994вҶ’- **Decision:** Run solver as separate service, not Node.js library
  3995вҶ’- **Context:** Need OR-Tools for optimization
  3996вҶ’- **Rationale:** OR-Tools is Python-native, best performance
  3997вҶ’- **Consequences:** Extra service to deploy, HTTP overhead acceptable
  3998вҶ’
  3999вҶ’---

  4078вҶ’
  4079вҶ’#### 17.2 Component Organization
  4080вҶ’
  4081вҶ’**Component Naming Convention**
  4082вҶ’
  4083вҶ’```typescript
  4084вҶ’// File: components/dashboard/KPICard.tsx
  4085вҶ’// Export: Named export matching filename
  4086вҶ’export function KPICard(props: KPICardProps) { ... }
  4087вҶ’
  4088вҶ’// Types co-located with component
  4089вҶ’interface KPICardProps {
  4090вҶ’  title: string;
  4091вҶ’  value: number | string;
  4092вҶ’  subtitle?: string;
  4093вҶ’  status?: 'green' | 'yellow' | 'red';
  4094вҶ’  onClick?: () => void;
  4095вҶ’}
  4096вҶ’```
  4097вҶ’
  4098вҶ’**Component Structure Pattern**
  4099вҶ’
  4100вҶ’```typescript
  4101вҶ’// Standard component structure
  4102вҶ’import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
  4103вҶ’import { Card } from '@blueprintjs/core';
  4104вҶ’
  4105вҶ’interface Props {
  4106вҶ’  // Props interface
  4107вҶ’}
  4108вҶ’
  4109вҶ’export function ComponentName({ prop1, prop2 }: Props) {
  4110вҶ’  // 1. Hooks (store selectors, effects)
  4111вҶ’  const data = useSelector(selectData);
  4112вҶ’
  4113вҶ’  // 2. Derived state
  4114вҶ’  const computedValue = useMemo(() => ..., [data]);
  4115вҶ’
  4116вҶ’  // 3. Event handlers
  4117вҶ’  const handleClick = useCallback(() => ..., []);
  4118вҶ’
  4119вҶ’  // 4. Render
  4120вҶ’  return (
  4121вҶ’    <Card className={cn('...')}>
  4122вҶ’      {/* JSX */}
  4123вҶ’    </Card>
  4124вҶ’  );
  4125вҶ’}
  4126вҶ’```
  4127вҶ’
  4128вҶ’**Component Categories**
  4129вҶ’
  4130вҶ’| Category | Purpose | Example |
  4131вҶ’|----------|---------|---------|
  4132вҶ’| Layout | Page structure | `Navbar`, `Sidebar` |
  4133вҶ’| Container | Data fetching, state | `DashboardContainer` |
  4134вҶ’| Presentational | Pure UI | `KPICard`, `TrainMarker` |
  4135вҶ’| Interactive | User actions | `ServiceList`, `GanttBlock` |
  4136вҶ’| Composite | Multiple components | `RecommendationPanel` |
  4137вҶ’
  4138вҶ’#### 17.3 State Management (@zazcart/toolkit)
  4139вҶ’
  4140вҶ’**Store Structure**
  4141вҶ’
  4142вҶ’```typescript
  4143вҶ’// stores/fleetStore.ts
  4144вҶ’import { createMachine, useMachine, useSelector } from '@zazcart/toolkit';
  4145вҶ’
  4146вҶ’interface FleetState {
  4147вҶ’  trains: Train[];
  4148вҶ’  depots: Depot[];
  4149вҶ’  selectedTrainId: string | null;
  4150вҶ’  loading: boolean;
  4151вҶ’  error: string | null;
  4152вҶ’}
  4153вҶ’
  4154вҶ’type FleetEvent =
  4155вҶ’  | { type: 'FETCH_TRAINS' }
  4156вҶ’  | { type: 'FETCH_SUCCESS'; trains: Train[] }
  4157вҶ’  | { type: 'FETCH_ERROR'; error: string }
  4158вҶ’  | { type: 'SELECT_TRAIN'; trainId: string };
  4159вҶ’
  4160вҶ’const fleetMachine = createMachine<FleetState, FleetEvent>({
  4161вҶ’  initial: 'idle',
  4162вҶ’  context: {
  4163вҶ’    trains: [],
  4164вҶ’    depots: [],
  4165вҶ’    selectedTrainId: null,
  4166вҶ’    loading: false,
  4167вҶ’    error: null,
  4168вҶ’  },
  4169вҶ’  states: {
  4170вҶ’    idle: {
  4171вҶ’      on: {
  4172вҶ’        FETCH_TRAINS: {
  4173вҶ’          target: 'loading',
  4174вҶ’          actions: ['setLoading'],
  4175вҶ’        },
  4176вҶ’      },
  4177вҶ’    },
  4178вҶ’    loading: {
  4179вҶ’      on: {
  4180вҶ’        FETCH_SUCCESS: {
  4181вҶ’          target: 'idle',
  4182вҶ’          actions: ['setTrains', 'clearLoading'],
  4183вҶ’        },
  4184вҶ’        FETCH_ERROR: {
  4185вҶ’          target: 'error',
  4186вҶ’          actions: ['setError'],
  4187вҶ’        },
  4188вҶ’      },
  4189вҶ’    },
  4190вҶ’    error: {
  4191вҶ’      on: {
  4192вҶ’        FETCH_TRAINS: {
  4193вҶ’          target: 'loading',
  4194вҶ’          actions: ['setLoading', 'clearError'],
  4195вҶ’        },
  4196вҶ’      },
  4197вҶ’    },
  4198вҶ’  },
  4199вҶ’});
  4200вҶ’
  4201вҶ’// Selectors
  4202вҶ’export const selectTrains = (state: FleetState) => state.trains;
  4203вҶ’export const selectSelectedTrain = (state: FleetState) =>
  4204вҶ’  state.trains.find(t => t.id === state.selectedTrainId);
  4205вҶ’
  4206вҶ’// Hook
  4207вҶ’export function useFleetStore() {
  4208вҶ’  return useMachine(fleetMachine);
  4209вҶ’}
  4210вҶ’```
  4211вҶ’
  4212вҶ’**Usage in Components**
  4213вҶ’
  4214вҶ’```typescript
  4215вҶ’// components/fleet/TrainList.tsx
  4216вҶ’import { useFleetStore, selectTrains } from '@/stores/fleetStore';
  4217вҶ’
  4218вҶ’export function TrainList() {
  4219вҶ’  const { state, send } = useFleetStore();
  4220вҶ’  const trains = useSelector(selectTrains);
  4221вҶ’
  4222вҶ’  useEffect(() => {
  4223вҶ’    send({ type: 'FETCH_TRAINS' });
  4224вҶ’  }, [send]);
  4225вҶ’
  4226вҶ’  if (state.loading) return <Spinner />;
  4227вҶ’  if (state.error) return <ErrorMessage error={state.error} />;
  4228вҶ’
  4229вҶ’  return (
  4230вҶ’    <div>
  4231вҶ’      {trains.map(train => (
  4232вҶ’        <TrainCard
  4233вҶ’          key={train.id}
  4234вҶ’          train={train}
  4235вҶ’          onClick={() => send({ type: 'SELECT_TRAIN', trainId: train.id })}
  4236вҶ’        />
  4237вҶ’      ))}
  4238вҶ’    </div>
  4239вҶ’  );
  4240вҶ’}
  4241вҶ’```
  4242вҶ’
  4243вҶ’#### 17.4 API Client Pattern
  4244вҶ’
  4245вҶ’**Centralized API Client**
  4246вҶ’
  4247вҶ’```typescript
  4248вҶ’// lib/api.ts
  4249вҶ’const API_BASE = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || 'http://localhost:4000/api';
  4250вҶ’
  4251вҶ’interface ApiResponse<T> {
  4252вҶ’  data: T;
  4253вҶ’  meta?: {
  4254вҶ’    total?: number;
  4255вҶ’    page?: number;
  4256вҶ’  };
  4257вҶ’}
  4258вҶ’
  4259вҶ’interface ApiError {
  4260вҶ’  error: string;
  4261вҶ’  code: string;
  4262вҶ’  details?: Record<string, unknown>;
  4263вҶ’}
  4264вҶ’
  4265вҶ’async function request<T>(
  4266вҶ’  endpoint: string,
  4267вҶ’  options: RequestInit = {}
  4268вҶ’): Promise<T> {
  4269вҶ’  const url = `${API_BASE}${endpoint}`;
  4270вҶ’
  4271вҶ’  const response = await fetch(url, {
  4272вҶ’    ...options,
  4273вҶ’    headers: {
  4274вҶ’      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  4275вҶ’      ...options.headers,
  4276вҶ’    },
  4277вҶ’  });
  4278вҶ’
  4279вҶ’  if (!response.ok) {
  4280вҶ’    const error: ApiError = await response.json();
  4281вҶ’    throw new Error(error.error || 'API Error');
  4282вҶ’  }
  4283вҶ’
  4284вҶ’  const result: ApiResponse<T> = await response.json();
  4285вҶ’  return result.data;
  4286вҶ’}
  4287вҶ’
  4288вҶ’// Typed API methods
  4289вҶ’export const api = {
  4290вҶ’  // Dashboard
  4291вҶ’  getDashboardSummary: () =>
  4292вҶ’    request<DashboardSummary>('/dashboard/summary'),
  4293вҶ’

  4295вҶ’    request<DepotCapacity[]>(`/dashboard/depot-capacity${date ? `?date=${date}` : ''}`),
  4296вҶ’
  4297вҶ’  // Trains
  4298вҶ’  getTrains: (params?: TrainFilters) =>
  4299вҶ’    request<Train[]>(`/trains${toQueryString(params)}`),
  4300вҶ’

  4306вҶ’

  4310вҶ’

  4326вҶ’

  4329вҶ’
  4330вҶ’  // Simulation

  4342вҶ’

  4355вҶ’#### 17.5 Blueprint.js Integration
  4356вҶ’
  4357вҶ’**Theme Configuration**

  4374вҶ’**Component Usage Pattern**
  4375вҶ’
  4376вҶ’```typescript
  4377вҶ’// Using Blueprint.js components
  4378вҶ’import {
  4379вҶ’  Card,
  4380вҶ’  Elevation,
  4381вҶ’  Button,
  4382вҶ’  Intent,
  4383вҶ’  Tag,
  4384вҶ’  Spinner,
  4385вҶ’  NonIdealState,
  4386вҶ’  Tooltip,
  4387вҶ’} from '@blueprintjs/core';
  4388вҶ’
  4389вҶ’export function KPICard({ title, value, status, onClick }: KPICardProps) {
  4390вҶ’  return (
  4391вҶ’    <Card
  4392вҶ’      elevation={Elevation.TWO}
  4393вҶ’      interactive={!!onClick}
  4394вҶ’      onClick={onClick}
  4395вҶ’      className="kpi-card"
  4396вҶ’    >
  4397вҶ’      <div className="kpi-header">
  4398вҶ’        <span className="kpi-title">{title}</span>
  4399вҶ’        <Tag intent={statusToIntent(status)}>{status}</Tag>
  4400вҶ’      </div>
  4401вҶ’      <div className="kpi-value">{value}</div>
  4402вҶ’    </Card>
  4403вҶ’  );
  4404вҶ’}
  4405вҶ’
  4406вҶ’function statusToIntent(status?: string): Intent {
  4407вҶ’  switch (status) {
  4408вҶ’    case 'green': return Intent.SUCCESS;
  4409вҶ’    case 'yellow': return Intent.WARNING;
  4410вҶ’    case 'red': return Intent.DANGER;
  4411вҶ’    default: return Intent.NONE;
  4412вҶ’  }
  4413вҶ’}
  4414вҶ’```

  4500вҶ’
  4501вҶ’### Chapter 18: Backend Architecture
  4502вҶ’
  4503вҶ’This chapter details the Fastify API implementation patterns.
  4504вҶ’
  4505вҶ’#### 18.1 Fastify Server Structure
  4506вҶ’
  4507вҶ’```typescript
  4508вҶ’// apps/api/src/index.ts
  4509вҶ’import Fastify from 'fastify';
  4510вҶ’import cors from '@fastify/cors';
  4511вҶ’import { dashboardRoutes } from './routes/dashboard';
  4512вҶ’import { trainRoutes } from './routes/trains';
  4513вҶ’import { allocationRoutes } from './routes/allocations';
  4514вҶ’import { simulationRoutes } from './routes/simulation';
  4515вҶ’import { maintenanceRoutes } from './routes/maintenance';
  4516вҶ’import { db } from './db/client';
  4517вҶ’
  4518вҶ’const server = Fastify({
  4519вҶ’  logger: true,
  4520вҶ’});
  4521вҶ’
  4522вҶ’// Plugins
  4523вҶ’await server.register(cors, {
  4524вҶ’  origin: ['http://localhost:3000'],
  4525вҶ’});
  4526вҶ’
  4527вҶ’// Database connection
  4528вҶ’server.decorate('db', db);
  4529вҶ’
  4530вҶ’// Routes
  4531вҶ’server.register(dashboardRoutes, { prefix: '/api/dashboard' });
  4532вҶ’server.register(trainRoutes, { prefix: '/api/trains' });
  4533вҶ’server.register(allocationRoutes, { prefix: '/api/allocations' });
  4534вҶ’server.register(simulationRoutes, { prefix: '/api/simulation' });
  4535вҶ’server.register(maintenanceRoutes, { prefix: '/api/maintenance' });
  4536вҶ’
  4537вҶ’// Health check
  4538вҶ’server.get('/health', async () => ({ status: 'ok' }));
  4539вҶ’
  4540вҶ’// Start server
  4541вҶ’const start = async () => {
  4542вҶ’  try {
  4543вҶ’    await server.listen({ port: 4000, host: '0.0.0.0' });
  4544вҶ’    console.log('Server running on http://localhost:4000');
  4545вҶ’  } catch (err) {
  4546вҶ’    server.log.error(err);
  4547вҶ’    process.exit(1);
  4548вҶ’  }
  4549вҶ’};
  4550вҶ’
  4551вҶ’start();
  4552вҶ’```
  4553вҶ’
  4554вҶ’#### 18.2 Route Organization
  4555вҶ’
  4556вҶ’**Route File Pattern**
  4557вҶ’
  4558вҶ’```typescript
  4559вҶ’// apps/api/src/routes/trains.ts
  4560вҶ’import { FastifyPluginAsync } from 'fastify';
  4561вҶ’import { TrainService } from '../services/trainService';
  4562вҶ’import { TrainFilters, TrainResponse } from '../types';
  4563вҶ’
  4564вҶ’export const trainRoutes: FastifyPluginAsync = async (fastify) => {
  4565вҶ’  const trainService = new TrainService(fastify.db);
  4566вҶ’
  4567вҶ’  // GET /api/trains
  4568вҶ’  fastify.get<{
  4569вҶ’    Querystring: TrainFilters;
  4570вҶ’    Reply: { data: TrainResponse[] };
  4571вҶ’  }>('/', {
  4572вҶ’    schema: {
  4573вҶ’      querystring: {
  4574вҶ’        type: 'object',
  4575вҶ’        properties: {
  4576вҶ’          fleet: { type: 'string' },
  4577вҶ’          depot: { type: 'string' },
  4578вҶ’          status: { type: 'string', enum: ['fit', 'unfit'] },
  4579вҶ’        },
  4580вҶ’      },
  4581вҶ’    },
  4582вҶ’  }, async (request, reply) => {
  4583вҶ’    const trains = await trainService.getTrains(request.query);
  4584вҶ’    return { data: trains };
  4585вҶ’  });
  4586вҶ’
  4587вҶ’  // GET /api/trains/:id
  4588вҶ’  fastify.get<{
  4589вҶ’    Params: { id: string };
  4590вҶ’    Reply: { data: TrainResponse };
  4591вҶ’  }>('/:id', async (request, reply) => {
  4592вҶ’    const train = await trainService.getTrainById(request.params.id);
  4593вҶ’    if (!train) {
  4594вҶ’      return reply.status(404).send({ error: 'Train not found', code: 'NOT_FOUND' });
  4595вҶ’    }
  4596вҶ’    return { data: train };
  4597вҶ’  });
  4598вҶ’
  4599вҶ’  // GET /api/trains/:id/history
  4600вҶ’  fastify.get<{
  4601вҶ’    Params: { id: string };
  4602вҶ’    Querystring: { months?: number };
  4603вҶ’    Reply: { data: MileagePoint[] };
  4604вҶ’  }>('/:id/history', async (request, reply) => {
  4605вҶ’    const months = request.query.months || 6;
  4606вҶ’    const history = await trainService.getTrainHistory(request.params.id, months);
  4607вҶ’    return { data: history };
  4608вҶ’  });
  4609вҶ’};
  4610вҶ’```
  4611вҶ’
  4612вҶ’**Route Summary**
  4613вҶ’
  4614вҶ’| Method | Path | Handler | Description |
  4615вҶ’|--------|------|---------|-------------|
  4616вҶ’| GET | /api/dashboard/summary | getDashboardSummary | KPI metrics |
  4617вҶ’| GET | /api/dashboard/depot-capacity | getDepotCapacity | Depot utilization |
  4618вҶ’| GET | /api/trains | getTrains | List trains with filters |
  4619вҶ’| GET | /api/trains/:id | getTrainById | Single train details |
  4620вҶ’| GET | /api/trains/:id/history | getTrainHistory | Mileage history |
  4621вҶ’| GET | /api/services/pending | getPendingServices | Unallocated services |
  4622вҶ’| POST | /api/allocations/recommend | getRecommendations | Solver recommendations |
  4623вҶ’| POST | /api/allocations | createAllocation | Create allocation |
  4624вҶ’| GET | /api/balancing/distribution | getDistribution | Km distribution |
  4625вҶ’| GET | /api/balancing/outliers | getOutliers | Over/under runners |
  4626вҶ’| POST | /api/scenarios | createScenario | New scenario |
  4627вҶ’| POST | /api/scenarios/:id/simulate | runSimulation | Execute simulation |
  4628вҶ’| GET | /api/maintenance | getSchedule | Maintenance timeline |
  4629вҶ’| PATCH | /api/maintenance/:id | reschedule | Move maintenance |
  4630вҶ’
  4631вҶ’#### 18.3 Service Layer Pattern
  4632вҶ’
  4633вҶ’**Service Class Structure**
  4634вҶ’
  4635вҶ’```typescript
  4636вҶ’// apps/api/src/services/trainService.ts
  4637вҶ’import { eq, and, gte, lte, sql } from 'drizzle-orm';
  4638вҶ’import { db } from '../db/client';
  4639вҶ’import { trains, fleets, depots, mileageHistory } from '../db/schema';
  4640вҶ’
  4641вҶ’export class TrainService {
  4642вҶ’  constructor(private db: typeof db) {}
  4643вҶ’
  4644вҶ’  async getTrains(filters: TrainFilters): Promise<TrainResponse[]> {
  4645вҶ’    let query = this.db
  4646вҶ’      .select({
  4647вҶ’        id: trains.id,
  4648вҶ’        trainId: trains.trainId,
  4649вҶ’        currentKm: trains.currentKm,
  4650вҶ’        fitnessStatus: trains.fitnessStatus,
  4651вҶ’        fleetName: fleets.name,
  4652вҶ’        depotName: depots.name,
  4653вҶ’        latitude: trains.latitude,
  4654вҶ’        longitude: trains.longitude,
  4655вҶ’      })
  4656вҶ’      .from(trains)
  4657вҶ’      .leftJoin(fleets, eq(trains.fleetId, fleets.id))
  4658вҶ’      .leftJoin(depots, eq(trains.baseDepotId, depots.id));
  4659вҶ’
  4660вҶ’    if (filters.fleet) {
  4661вҶ’      query = query.where(eq(trains.fleetId, filters.fleet));
  4662вҶ’    }
  4663вҶ’    if (filters.depot) {
  4664вҶ’      query = query.where(eq(trains.baseDepotId, filters.depot));
  4665вҶ’    }
  4666вҶ’    if (filters.status) {
  4667вҶ’      query = query.where(eq(trains.fitnessStatus, filters.status));
  4668вҶ’    }
  4669вҶ’
  4670вҶ’    return query;
  4671вҶ’  }
  4672вҶ’
  4673вҶ’  async getTrainById(id: string): Promise<TrainDetailResponse | null> {
  4674вҶ’    const [train] = await this.db
  4675вҶ’      .select()
  4676вҶ’      .from(trains)
  4677вҶ’      .leftJoin(fleets, eq(trains.fleetId, fleets.id))
  4678вҶ’      .leftJoin(depots, eq(trains.baseDepotId, depots.id))
  4679вҶ’      .where(eq(trains.id, id));
  4680вҶ’
  4681вҶ’    if (!train) return null;
  4682вҶ’
  4683вҶ’    // Calculate delta from fleet average
  4684вҶ’    const avgResult = await this.db
  4685вҶ’      .select({ avg: sql<number>`avg(${trains.currentKm})` })
  4686вҶ’      .from(trains)
  4687вҶ’      .where(eq(trains.fleetId, train.trains.fleetId));
  4688вҶ’
  4689вҶ’    const fleetAverage = avgResult[0]?.avg || 0;
  4690вҶ’    const deltaPercent = ((train.trains.currentKm - fleetAverage) / fleetAverage) * 100;
  4691вҶ’
  4692вҶ’    return {
  4693вҶ’      ...train.trains,
  4694вҶ’      fleet: train.fleets,
  4695вҶ’      depot: train.depots,
  4696вҶ’      deltaPercent: Math.round(deltaPercent * 10) / 10,
  4697вҶ’    };
  4698вҶ’  }
  4699вҶ’
  4700вҶ’  async getTrainHistory(trainId: string, months: number): Promise<MileagePoint[]> {
  4701вҶ’    const startDate = new Date();
  4702вҶ’    startDate.setMonth(startDate.getMonth() - months);
  4703вҶ’
  4704вҶ’    return this.db
  4705вҶ’      .select({
  4706вҶ’        date: mileageHistory.recordedDate,
  4707вҶ’        km: mileageHistory.kmValue,
  4708вҶ’      })
  4709вҶ’      .from(mileageHistory)
  4710вҶ’      .where(
  4711вҶ’        and(
  4712вҶ’          eq(mileageHistory.trainId, trainId),
  4713вҶ’          gte(mileageHistory.recordedDate, startDate)
  4714вҶ’        )
  4715вҶ’      )
  4716вҶ’      .orderBy(mileageHistory.recordedDate);
  4717вҶ’  }
  4718вҶ’}
  4719вҶ’```
  4720вҶ’
  4721вҶ’#### 18.4 Database Access (Drizzle ORM)
  4722вҶ’
  4723вҶ’**Schema Definition**
  4724вҶ’
  4725вҶ’```typescript
  4726вҶ’// apps/api/src/db/schema.ts
  4727вҶ’import {
  4728вҶ’  pgTable,
  4729вҶ’  uuid,
  4730вҶ’  varchar,
  4731вҶ’  integer,
  4732вҶ’  decimal,
  4733вҶ’  timestamp,
  4734вҶ’  date,
  4735вҶ’  time,
  4736вҶ’  jsonb,
  4737вҶ’  index,
  4738вҶ’  uniqueIndex,
  4739вҶ’} from 'drizzle-orm/pg-core';
  4740вҶ’
  4741вҶ’export const fleets = pgTable('fleets', {
  4742вҶ’  id: uuid('id').primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
  4743вҶ’  name: varchar('name', { length: 100 }).notNull(),
  4744вҶ’  manufacturer: varchar('manufacturer', { length: 50 }),
  4745вҶ’  pm1IntervalKm: integer('pm1_interval_km').notNull(),
  4746вҶ’  pm2IntervalKm: integer('pm2_interval_km').notNull(),
  4747вҶ’  hmIntervalKm: integer('hm_interval_km').notNull(),
  4748вҶ’  createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow(),
  4749вҶ’});
  4750вҶ’
  4751вҶ’export const depots = pgTable('depots', {
  4752вҶ’  id: uuid('id').primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
  4753вҶ’  name: varchar('name', { length: 100 }).notNull(),
  4754вҶ’  code: varchar('code', { length: 10 }).notNull(),
  4755вҶ’  latitude: decimal('latitude', { precision: 10, scale: 6 }),
  4756вҶ’  longitude: decimal('longitude', { precision: 10, scale: 6 }),
  4757вҶ’  capacityTracks: integer('capacity_tracks').default(5),
  4758вҶ’  capacityManhours: integer('capacity_manhours').default(80),
  4759вҶ’  createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow(),
  4760вҶ’}, (table) => [
  4761вҶ’  uniqueIndex('depots_code_idx').on(table.code),
  4762вҶ’]);
  4763вҶ’
  4764вҶ’export const trains = pgTable('trains', {
  4765вҶ’  id: uuid('id').primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
  4766вҶ’  trainId: varchar('train_id', { length: 20 }).notNull(),
  4767вҶ’  fleetId: uuid('fleet_id').references(() => fleets.id),
  4768вҶ’  baseDepotId: uuid('base_depot_id').references(() => depots.id),
  4769вҶ’  currentKm: integer('current_km').default(0),
  4770вҶ’  targetKm: integer('target_km').default(0),
  4771вҶ’  fitnessStatus: varchar('fitness_status', { length: 10 }).default('fit'),
  4772вҶ’  lastMaintenanceDate: date('last_maintenance_date'),
  4773вҶ’  nextMaintenanceKm: integer('next_maintenance_km'),
  4774вҶ’  latitude: decimal('latitude', { precision: 10, scale: 6 }),
  4775вҶ’  longitude: decimal('longitude', { precision: 10, scale: 6 }),
  4776вҶ’  createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow(),
  4777вҶ’  updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at').defaultNow(),
  4778вҶ’}, (table) => [
  4779вҶ’  uniqueIndex('trains_train_id_idx').on(table.trainId),
  4780вҶ’  index('trains_fleet_idx').on(table.fleetId),
  4781вҶ’  index('trains_depot_idx').on(table.baseDepotId),
  4782вҶ’]);
  4783вҶ’
  4784вҶ’// ... additional tables (services, allocations, mileageHistory, maintenanceSchedules)
  4785вҶ’```

  4803вҶ’#### 18.5 Caching Strategy (Redis)
  4804вҶ’
  4805вҶ’**Cache Configuration**
  4806вҶ’
  4807вҶ’```typescript
  4808вҶ’// apps/api/src/cache/redis.ts
  4809вҶ’import Redis from 'ioredis';
  4810вҶ’
  4811вҶ’const redis = new Redis(process.env.REDIS_URL || 'redis://localhost:6379');
  4812вҶ’
  4813вҶ’export const cache = {
  4814вҶ’  async get<T>(key: string): Promise<T | null> {
  4815вҶ’    const data = await redis.get(key);
  4816вҶ’    return data ? JSON.parse(data) : null;
  4817вҶ’  },
  4818вҶ’
  4819вҶ’  async set<T>(key: string, value: T, ttlSeconds: number): Promise<void> {
  4820вҶ’    await redis.setex(key, ttlSeconds, JSON.stringify(value));
  4821вҶ’  },
  4822вҶ’
  4823вҶ’  async del(key: string): Promise<void> {
  4824вҶ’    await redis.del(key);
  4825вҶ’  },
  4826вҶ’
  4827вҶ’  async invalidatePattern(pattern: string): Promise<void> {
  4828вҶ’    const keys = await redis.keys(pattern);
  4829вҶ’    if (keys.length > 0) {
  4830вҶ’      await redis.del(...keys);
  4831вҶ’    }
  4832вҶ’  },
  4833вҶ’};
  4834вҶ’
  4835вҶ’// Cache key patterns
  4836вҶ’export const CACHE_KEYS = {
  4837вҶ’  DASHBOARD_SUMMARY: 'dashboard:summary',
  4838вҶ’  DEPOT_CAPACITY: (date: string) => `depot:capacity:${date}`,
  4839вҶ’  TRAINS_LIST: (hash: string) => `trains:list:${hash}`,
  4840вҶ’  TRAIN_DETAIL: (id: string) => `train:${id}`,
  4841вҶ’  SOLVER_RESULT: (hash: string) => `solver:${hash}`,
  4842вҶ’};
  4843вҶ’
  4844вҶ’// TTL values in seconds
  4845вҶ’export const CACHE_TTL = {
  4846вҶ’  DASHBOARD: 60,      // 1 minute
  4847вҶ’  TRAINS: 30,         // 30 seconds
  4848вҶ’  DEPOT: 300,         // 5 minutes
  4849вҶ’  SOLVER: 300,        // 5 minutes
  4850вҶ’  STATIC: 3600,       // 1 hour
  4851вҶ’};
  4852вҶ’```
  4853вҶ’
  4854вҶ’**Cache Usage in Service**
  4855вҶ’
  4856вҶ’```typescript
  4857вҶ’// Using cache in service layer
  4858вҶ’async getDashboardSummary(): Promise<DashboardSummary> {
  4859вҶ’  // Try cache first
  4860вҶ’  const cached = await cache.get<DashboardSummary>(CACHE_KEYS.DASHBOARD_SUMMARY);
  4861вҶ’  if (cached) return cached;
  4862вҶ’
  4863вҶ’  // Fetch from database
  4864вҶ’  const summary = await this.computeDashboardSummary();
  4865вҶ’
  4866вҶ’  // Store in cache
  4867вҶ’  await cache.set(CACHE_KEYS.DASHBOARD_SUMMARY, summary, CACHE_TTL.DASHBOARD);
  4868вҶ’
  4869вҶ’  return summary;
  4870вҶ’}
  4871вҶ’```

  4939вҶ’
  4940вҶ’### Chapter 19: Python Solver Architecture
  4941вҶ’
  4942вҶ’This chapter details the OR-Tools optimization engine.
  4943вҶ’
  4944вҶ’#### 19.1 OR-Tools CP-SAT Model
  4945вҶ’
  4946вҶ’**Solver Structure**
  4947вҶ’
  4948вҶ’```python
  4949вҶ’# solver/src/engine/allocator.py
  4950вҶ’from ortools.sat.python import cp_model
  4951вҶ’from dataclasses import dataclass
  4952вҶ’from typing import List, Tuple
  4953вҶ’
  4954вҶ’@dataclass
  4955вҶ’class Train:
  4956вҶ’    id: str
  4957вҶ’    train_code: str
  4958вҶ’    current_km: int
  4959вҶ’    fleet_average: int
  4960вҶ’    depot_id: str
  4961вҶ’    latitude: float
  4962вҶ’    longitude: float
  4963вҶ’    fitness_status: str
  4964вҶ’
  4965вҶ’@dataclass
  4966вҶ’class Service:
  4967вҶ’    id: str
  4968вҶ’    service_code: str
  4969вҶ’    distance_km: int
  4970вҶ’    origin: str
  4971вҶ’    destination: str
  4972вҶ’    origin_lat: float
  4973вҶ’    origin_lng: float
  4974вҶ’    dest_lat: float
  4975вҶ’    dest_lng: float
  4976вҶ’
  4977вҶ’class AllocationSolver:
  4978вҶ’    def __init__(self, trains: List[Train], service: Service, config: dict):
  4979вҶ’        self.trains = trains
  4980вҶ’        self.service = service
  4981вҶ’        self.config = config
  4982вҶ’        self.model = cp_model.CpModel()
  4983вҶ’
  4984вҶ’    def solve(self) -> List[dict]:
  4985вҶ’        # Filter fit trains only
  4986вҶ’        candidates = [t for t in self.trains if t.fitness_status == 'fit']
  4987вҶ’
  4988вҶ’        if not candidates:
  4989вҶ’            return []
  4990вҶ’
  4991вҶ’        # Score each candidate
  4992вҶ’        scored = []
  4993вҶ’        for train in candidates:
  4994вҶ’            score = self._calculate_score(train)
  4995вҶ’            justifications = self._generate_justifications(train)
  4996вҶ’            scored.append({
  4997вҶ’                'train_id': train.id,
  4998вҶ’                'train_code': train.train_code,
  4999вҶ’                'score': score,
  5000вҶ’                'justifications': justifications,
  5001вҶ’                'dead_running_km': self._calculate_dead_running(train),
  5002вҶ’            })
  5003вҶ’
  5004вҶ’        # Sort by score descending
  5005вҶ’        scored.sort(key=lambda x: x['score'], reverse=True)
  5006вҶ’
  5007вҶ’        # Return top 5
  5008вҶ’        return scored[:5]
  5009вҶ’```
  5010вҶ’
  5011вҶ’#### 19.2 Scoring Algorithm
  5012вҶ’
  5013вҶ’**Score Breakdown**
  5014вҶ’
  5015вҶ’| Factor | Weight | Scoring Logic |
  5016вҶ’|--------|--------|--------------|
  5017вҶ’| Km Balance | 40% | Lower delta from average = higher score |
  5018вҶ’| Dead Running | 15% | Shorter empty km = higher score |
  5019вҶ’| Depot Proximity | 25% | Closer to maintenance depot = higher score |
  5020вҶ’| Maintenance Alignment | 20% | Aligned with scheduled maintenance = higher score |
  5021вҶ’
  5022вҶ’**Score Calculation**
  5023вҶ’
  5024вҶ’```python
  5025вҶ’def _calculate_score(self, train: Train) -> int:
  5026вҶ’    score = 100  # Start with perfect score
  5027вҶ’
  5028вҶ’    # Factor 1: Km Balance (40% weight)
  5029вҶ’    delta_pct = abs(train.current_km - train.fleet_average) / train.fleet_average
  5030вҶ’    balance_penalty = min(delta_pct * 100, 40)
  5031вҶ’
  5032вҶ’    # Bonus for under-running trains
  5033вҶ’    if train.current_km < train.fleet_average:
  5034вҶ’        balance_penalty = balance_penalty * 0.5
  5035вҶ’    score -= balance_penalty
  5036вҶ’
  5037вҶ’    # Factor 2: Dead Running (15% weight)
  5038вҶ’    dead_km = self._calculate_dead_running(train)
  5039вҶ’    dead_penalty = min((dead_km / 100) * 15, 15)
  5040вҶ’    score -= dead_penalty
  5041вҶ’
  5042вҶ’    # Factor 3: Depot Proximity (25% weight)
  5043вҶ’    dest_to_depot = self._distance_to_nearest_depot(train)
  5044вҶ’    proximity_penalty = min((dest_to_depot / 50) * 25, 25)
  5045вҶ’    score -= proximity_penalty
  5046вҶ’
  5047вҶ’    return max(0, min(100, int(score)))
  5048вҶ’```
  5049вҶ’
  5050вҶ’#### 19.3 Justification Generation
  5051вҶ’
  5052вҶ’**Justification Templates**
  5053вҶ’
  5054вҶ’```python
  5055вҶ’JUSTIFICATION_TEMPLATES = {
  5056вҶ’    'km_balance_under': "Km {delta:.0f}% below fleet average - prioritizing for balance",
  5057вҶ’    'km_balance_over': "Km {delta:.0f}% above average - acceptable given other factors",
  5058вҶ’    'dead_running_low': "Only {km}km dead running to service start",
  5059вҶ’    'dead_running_high': "вҡ пёҸ {km}km dead running - consider alternatives",
  5060вҶ’    'depot_close': "Service ends {km}km from {depot} maintenance depot",
  5061вҶ’    'maintenance_aligned': "PM{type} scheduled in {days} days - natural alignment",
  5062вҶ’}
  5063вҶ’```
  5064вҶ’
  5065вҶ’#### 19.4 API Interface (FastAPI)
  5066вҶ’
  5067вҶ’```python
  5068вҶ’# solver/src/main.py
  5069вҶ’from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException

  5080вҶ’

  5084вҶ’

  5086вҶ’async def recommend(request: RecommendRequest):

  5089вҶ’    results = solver.solve()

  5091вҶ’    return RecommendResponse(recommendations=results, solver_time_ms=solver_time)
  5092вҶ’

  5097вҶ’
  5098вҶ’#### 19.5 Fallback Mechanisms
  5099вҶ’
  5100вҶ’**Simple Scoring Fallback**
  5101вҶ’
  5102вҶ’```python
  5103вҶ’def simple_score(trains: List[Train], service: Service) -> List[dict]:
  5104вҶ’    """Fallback when CP-SAT times out."""
  5105вҶ’    scored = []
  5106вҶ’    for train in trains:
  5107вҶ’        if train.fitness_status != 'fit':
  5108вҶ’            continue
  5109вҶ’        delta_pct = abs(train.current_km - train.fleet_average) / train.fleet_average
  5110вҶ’        score = max(0, 100 - int(delta_pct * 100))
  5111вҶ’        if train.current_km < train.fleet_average:
  5112вҶ’            score = min(100, score + 10)
  5113вҶ’        scored.append({
  5114вҶ’            'train_id': train.id,
  5115вҶ’            'train_code': train.train_code,
  5116вҶ’            'score': score,
  5117вҶ’            'justifications': ["Scored using simple heuristic (solver timeout)"],
  5118вҶ’            'dead_running_km': 0,
  5119вҶ’        })
  5120вҶ’    return sorted(scored, key=lambda x: x['score'], reverse=True)[:5]
  5121вҶ’```

  5163вҶ’в”Ӯ id (PK)             в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ id (PK)             в”Ӯ
  5164вҶ’в”Ӯ service_id (FK)     в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ train_id (FK)       в”Ӯ
  5165вҶ’в”Ӯ train_id (FK)       в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ depot_id (FK)       в”Ӯ
  5166вҶ’в”Ӯ allocation_date     в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ maintenance_type    в”Ӯ
  5167вҶ’в”Ӯ status              в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ scheduled_date      в”Ӯ
  5168вҶ’в”Ӯ score               в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ duration_days       в”Ӯ
  5169вҶ’в”Ӯ justifications      в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ status              в”Ӯ
  5170вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
  5171вҶ’```
  5172вҶ’
  5173вҶ’#### 20.2 Table Specifications
  5174вҶ’
  5175вҶ’| Table | Key Columns | Purpose |
  5176вҶ’|-------|-------------|---------|
  5177вҶ’| fleets | id, name, pm1/pm2/hm intervals | Fleet type definitions |
  5178вҶ’| depots | id, name, code, capacity | Maintenance depot info |
  5179вҶ’| trains | id, train_id, fleet_id, current_km, fitness | Train master data |
  5180вҶ’| services | id, service_code, origin, destination, distance | Service definitions |
  5181вҶ’| allocations | id, service_id, train_id, date, score, justifications | Train-service assignments |
  5182вҶ’| maintenance_schedules | id, train_id, depot_id, type, date, duration | Scheduled maintenances |
  5183вҶ’| mileage_history | id, train_id, date, km_value | Historical km readings |
  5184вҶ’
  5185вҶ’#### 20.3 Indexing Strategy
  5186вҶ’
  5187вҶ’```sql
  5188вҶ’-- Unique indexes
  5189вҶ’CREATE UNIQUE INDEX depots_code_idx ON depots(code);
  5190вҶ’CREATE UNIQUE INDEX trains_train_id_idx ON trains(train_id);
  5191вҶ’CREATE UNIQUE INDEX services_code_idx ON services(service_code);
  5192вҶ’CREATE UNIQUE INDEX allocations_service_date_idx ON allocations(service_id, allocation_date);
  5193вҶ’
  5194вҶ’-- Foreign key indexes
  5195вҶ’CREATE INDEX trains_fleet_idx ON trains(fleet_id);
  5196вҶ’CREATE INDEX trains_depot_idx ON trains(base_depot_id);
  5197вҶ’CREATE INDEX allocations_date_idx ON allocations(allocation_date);
  5198вҶ’CREATE INDEX maintenance_date_idx ON maintenance_schedules(scheduled_date);
  5199вҶ’CREATE INDEX mileage_train_date_idx ON mileage_history(train_id, recorded_date);
  5200вҶ’```
  5201вҶ’
  5202вҶ’#### 20.4 Seed Data Structure
  5203вҶ’
  5204вҶ’**Data Volumes**
  5205вҶ’
  5206вҶ’| Table | Record Count | Notes |
  5207вҶ’|-------|--------------|-------|
  5208вҶ’| fleets | 3-4 | Different train series |
  5209вҶ’| depots | 12-15 | Portuguese railway network |
  5210вҶ’| trains | 100-120 | Realistic fleet size |
  5211вҶ’| services | 50-100 | Daily service patterns |
  5212вҶ’| allocations | Variable | Sample allocations |
  5213вҶ’| mileage_history | ~22,000 | 6 months Г— 120 trains |
  5214вҶ’| maintenance_schedules | 200-300 | 3-month window |
  5215вҶ’
  5216вҶ’#### 20.5 Query Patterns
  5217вҶ’
  5218вҶ’**Dashboard Summary**
  5219вҶ’
  5220вҶ’```sql
  5221вҶ’SELECT
  5222вҶ’  COUNT(*) as total_trains,
  5223вҶ’  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE fitness_status = 'fit') as fit_count,
  5224вҶ’  ROUND(STDDEV(current_km) / AVG(current_km) * 100, 1) as km_variance
  5225вҶ’FROM trains;
  5226вҶ’```
  5227вҶ’
  5228вҶ’**Train Ranking (Outliers)**
  5229вҶ’
  5230вҶ’```sql
  5231вҶ’WITH fleet_stats AS (
  5232вҶ’  SELECT fleet_id, AVG(current_km) as avg, STDDEV(current_km) as stddev
  5233вҶ’  FROM trains GROUP BY fleet_id
  5234вҶ’)
  5235вҶ’SELECT t.train_id, t.current_km,
  5236вҶ’       ROUND((t.current_km - fs.avg) / fs.avg * 100, 1) as delta_pct
  5237вҶ’FROM trains t
  5238вҶ’JOIN fleet_stats fs ON t.fleet_id = fs.fleet_id
  5239вҶ’ORDER BY ABS(delta_pct) DESC;
  5240вҶ’```
  5241вҶ’
  5242вҶ’---
  5243вҶ’
  5244вҶ’### Chapter 21: API Specification
  5245вҶ’
  5246вҶ’This chapter provides the complete API reference.
  5247вҶ’
  5248вҶ’#### 21.1 RESTful Endpoints List
  5249вҶ’
  5250вҶ’| Method | Endpoint | Description |
  5251вҶ’|--------|----------|-------------|
  5252вҶ’| GET | /api/dashboard/summary | Fleet KPI summary |
  5253вҶ’| GET | /api/dashboard/depot-capacity | Depot utilization |
  5254вҶ’| GET | /api/trains | List trains |
  5255вҶ’| GET | /api/trains/:id | Train details |
  5256вҶ’| GET | /api/trains/:id/history | Mileage history |
  5257вҶ’| GET | /api/services/pending | Unallocated services |
  5258вҶ’| POST | /api/allocations/recommend | Get recommendations |
  5259вҶ’| POST | /api/allocations | Create allocation |
  5260вҶ’| GET | /api/balancing/distribution | Km distribution |
  5261вҶ’| GET | /api/balancing/outliers | Over/under runners |
  5262вҶ’| POST | /api/scenarios | Create scenario |
  5263вҶ’| POST | /api/scenarios/:id/simulate | Run simulation |
  5264вҶ’| GET | /api/maintenance | Get schedule |
  5265вҶ’| PATCH | /api/maintenance/:id | Reschedule |
  5266вҶ’
  5267вҶ’#### 21.2 Request/Response Schemas
  5268вҶ’
  5269вҶ’**GET /api/dashboard/summary Response**
  5270вҶ’
  5271вҶ’```json
  5272вҶ’{
  5273вҶ’  "data": {
  5274вҶ’    "totalTrains": 112,
  5275вҶ’    "fitTrains": 98,
  5276вҶ’    "unfitTrains": 14,
  5277вҶ’    "kmVariance": 12.3,
  5278вҶ’    "varianceStatus": "yellow",
  5279вҶ’    "pendingAllocations": 24,
  5280вҶ’    "maintenanceDueThisWeek": 17
  5281вҶ’  }
  5282вҶ’}
  5283вҶ’```
  5284вҶ’
  5285вҶ’**POST /api/allocations/recommend Response**
  5286вҶ’
  5287вҶ’```json
  5288вҶ’{
  5289вҶ’  "data": {
  5290вҶ’    "recommendations": [
  5291вҶ’      {
  5292вҶ’        "trainId": "uuid",
  5293вҶ’        "trainCode": "UTE-3400-012",
  5294вҶ’        "score": 94,
  5295вҶ’        "justifications": [
  5296вҶ’          "Km 12% below fleet average",
  5297вҶ’          "Service ends 5km from Porto depot",
  5298вҶ’          "PM1 scheduled in 3 days"
  5299вҶ’        ],
  5300вҶ’        "deadRunningKm": 45
  5301вҶ’      }
  5302вҶ’    ],
  5303вҶ’    "solverTimeMs": 234
  5304вҶ’  }
  5305вҶ’}
  5306вҶ’```
  5307вҶ’
  5308вҶ’#### 21.3 Error Handling
  5309вҶ’
  5310вҶ’**Error Response Format**
  5311вҶ’
  5312вҶ’```json
  5313вҶ’{
  5314вҶ’  "error": "Train not found",
  5315вҶ’  "code": "NOT_FOUND",
  5316вҶ’  "details": {}
  5317вҶ’}
  5318вҶ’```
  5319вҶ’
  5320вҶ’**Error Codes**
  5321вҶ’
  5322вҶ’| Code | HTTP Status | Description |
  5323вҶ’|------|-------------|-------------|
  5324вҶ’| NOT_FOUND | 404 | Resource not found |
  5325вҶ’| VALIDATION_ERROR | 400 | Invalid request |
  5326вҶ’| CONFLICT | 409 | Resource conflict |
  5327вҶ’| SOLVER_ERROR | 503 | Solver unavailable |
  5328вҶ’| INTERNAL_ERROR | 500 | Server error |
  5329вҶ’
  5330вҶ’#### 21.4 Rate Limiting & Performance
  5331вҶ’
  5332вҶ’**Target Response Times**
  5333вҶ’
  5334вҶ’| Endpoint | Target |
  5335вҶ’|----------|--------|
  5336вҶ’| Dashboard | < 200ms |
  5337вҶ’| Train list | < 300ms |
  5338вҶ’| Recommendations | < 30s |
  5339вҶ’| Simulation | < 10s |
  5340вҶ’
  5341вҶ’#### 21.5 Versioning Strategy
  5342вҶ’
  5343вҶ’For demo: No versioning (all endpoints at `/api/...`)
  5344вҶ’
  5345вҶ’Production recommendation: `/api/v1/...` prefix with header-based versioning for breaking changes.
  5346вҶ’
  5347вҶ’---

Monorepo Structure ``` mms-mfc/ в”ңв”Җв”Җ package.json # Root package (workspaces) в”ңв”Җв”Җ bun.lockb # Bun lock file в”ңв”Җв”Җ turbo.json # Turborepo config в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ apps/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ web/ #
